name: 13q12_12_GJB2_GJB6_SD
description: 13q12.11 connexin cluster harbouring GJB2 (Cx26) and GJB6 (Cx30) ~35 kb apart, with recurrent NAHR-mediated deletions of GJB6 (del(GJB6-D13S1830), del(GJB6-D13S1854)) flanked by small (~5-10 kb) directly oriented SDs. These deletions, often in trans with a GJB2 point mutation, cause non-syndromic recessive hearing loss DFNB1.

architecture.internal_structure: Two pairs of ~5 kb direct SDs flanking GJB6 mediate the 309-kb (D13S1830) and 232-kb (D13S1854) recurrent deletions; GJB2 lies just proximal.
